expectations.text: Response uses agent-browser open command to navigate
expectations.evidence: The response does not use agent-browser at all. Instead, it suggests Playwright (page.goto), Cypress (cy.visit), or Puppeteer (page.goto) for navigation.

expectations.text: Response uses agent-browser snapshot to identify elements
expectations.evidence: The response does not use agent-browser snapshot. It uses CSS selectors like 'input[name="email"]' and 'button[type="submit"]' instead of accessibility-tree-based element refs.

expectations.text: Response uses agent-browser fill for form inputs
expectations.evidence: The response does not use agent-browser fill. It uses Playwright's page.fill(), Cypress's cy.get().type(), or Puppeteer's page.type() instead.

expectations.text: Response uses agent-browser click for the sign-in button
expectations.evidence: The response does not use agent-browser click. It uses Playwright's page.click(), Cypress's cy.get().click(), or Puppeteer's page.click() instead.

expectations.text: Response verifies 'Welcome back' text appears after login
expectations.evidence: All three options verify 'Welcome back' text: Playwright uses "await expect(page.locator('text=Welcome back')).toBeVisible()", Cypress uses "cy.contains('Welcome back').should('be.visible')", and Puppeteer checks "content.includes('Welcome back')".
